scope: File section and Text section test cases

gapInventory.description: No test verifies that the upload button becomes DISABLED after the 5th file is uploaded (max 5 file limit). Existing tests upload single files only. VCST-4825 filed this bug.

gapInventory.area: File Section — None Option Clears Files
gapInventory.description: CFG-E2E-023 tests optional section with no-file scenario but does NOT test the flow: upload file → then select 'None' → verify files cleared. VCST-4826 filed this bug.

CFG-E2E-031 mentions '0-byte file' in a single assertion bullet but the test steps do not include the specific fixture (large_logo.png, 0 bytes). The case mixes many size scenarios together without explicit upload of an empty file from the known fixture set. VCST-4827 filed this bug.
gapInventory.coveredBy: CFG-E2E-031 (partial — assertion listed but no dedicated step)

gapInventory.area: File Section — Quantity Counter With Unfilled Required
gapInventory.description: No existing test case verifies that the quantity '+' counter does NOT increment when a required File section is unfilled. VCST-4828 filed this bug.

gapInventory.area: File Section — Add-to-Cart Button Disabled State
gapInventory.description: CFG-E2E-022 tests that add-to-cart is blocked when no file is uploaded, but does NOT verify the 'Add to Cart' button itself is disabled (aria-disabled / disabled attribute) before upload. It only verifies the outcome (blocked). VCST-4829 explicitly requires button-level disabled state check.
gapInventory.coveredBy: CFG-E2E-022 (partial — outcome tested, not button state)

gapInventory.area: File Section — Multiple Files, Individual Remove
gapInventory.description: No test verifies that removing one file from a multi-file upload list removes only that file and leaves others intact. CFG-E2E-033 only tests removing the single uploaded file.

gapInventory.area: File Section — Accepted vs Rejected Types with QA Fixtures
gapInventory.description: CFG-E2E-030 tests invalid file types but uses generic '.exe', '.mp3', '.html', '.bat' — none of which are in the actual QA upload fixtures. The real test data includes download.avif and Stabilio.webp (unsupported) alongside valid PNG/PDF/XLSX. A fixture-specific test is needed.

gapInventory.area: File Section — Platform 10MB Limit vs Product-Config 2MB
gapInventory.description: CFG-E2E-031 references '2MB' product-config-level max but the platform-wide default is 10MB (9.54 MiB). There is no case testing the 5MB fixture (large_test.png) against the actual platform limit, nor testing the 24MB video.mp4 against the platform max.
gapInventory.coveredBy: CFG-E2E-031 (partial — uses a different max than platform default)

gapInventory.area: File Section — Recovery After Multiple Failed Uploads
gapInventory.description: No test verifies the upload control recovers and accepts a valid file after a sequence of failures (bad type followed by 0-byte file). Upload control could be left in a stuck state.

CFG-E2E-017 mentions 'character limit 30 if available' but does not explicitly test BVA: 30 chars (at-limit, should pass), 31 chars (over-limit, should fail). No dedicated boundary value analysis case for text max-length.
CFG-E2E-018 tests empty field but does NOT test whitespace-only input (5 spaces). Whitespace-only is a classic validation bypass. Not covered anywhere in the suite.

gapInventory.area: Text Section — Optional with Empty vs Filled Scenarios Using Seeded Products
gapInventory.description: CFG-E2E-019 creates a new admin product for optional text. There is now a seeded product (AGENT-TEST-Config-Gift-Box-20260324) already available. A test using the seeded product without admin setup is missing.

gapInventory.area: Text Section — MaxLength 100 Boundary Value (Gift Box)
gapInventory.description: No test covers the 100-character boundary for the Gift Box product (optional text, maxLength 100). This is the other known seeded product.

gapInventory.area: Text Section — Special Characters and Unicode Preservation
gapInventory.description: CFG-E2E-027 tests XSS attack strings but there is no test for legitimate special characters (& — !) and international Unicode characters (French, German, Japanese) being preserved through cart display without HTML encoding corruption.
gapInventory.coveredBy: CFG-E2E-027 (security focus only, not legitimate unicode)

gapInventory.area: Text Section — Full E2E Persistence Using Seeded Products
gapInventory.description: CFG-E2E-020 does a full E2E flow but uses admin-created products. A case using the seeded AGENT-TEST-Config-Engraved-Ring-20260324 that persists through checkout to order history is missing.

gapInventory.area: Text Section — Quantity Counter Blocked When Required Text Empty
gapInventory.description: VCST-4828 applies equally to required Text sections (not just File sections). No existing test verifies the quantity '+' counter is blocked when a required Text section is empty.

gapInventory.area: Text Section — Add-to-Cart Button Disabled When Required Text Empty
gapInventory.description: VCST-4829 applies equally to required Text sections. CFG-E2E-018 only tests the outcome (blocked) but not the button disabled state itself.
gapInventory.coveredBy: CFG-E2E-018 (partial — outcome tested, not button state)

VCST-4825.description: File upload button remains active after max file limit (5) reached

VCST-4826.description: Selecting None on optional File section doesn't clear uploaded files

VCST-4827.description: 0-byte file satisfies required File section validation
VCST-4827.existingCoverage: Partially covered by CFG-E2E-031 assertion, but no dedicated case with the 0-byte fixture

VCST-4828.description: Quantity counter increments when add-to-cart blocked by required section validation
VCST-4828.existingCoverage: Not covered for either File or Text sections

VCST-4829.description: Add-to-cart + button should be disabled when required config sections unfilled
VCST-4829.existingCoverage: Partially covered by outcome checks in CFG-E2E-022 and CFG-E2E-018, but no button state assertions

BL-CAT-006.rule: Configurable products require all required sections to be filled before add-to-cart
BL-CAT-006.gaps: Button disabled state (not just blocked outcome) — CFG-FILE-005, CFG-TEXT-008 address this

BL-CART-001.gaps: Quantity counter interaction when required sections unfilled — CFG-FILE-004, CFG-TEXT-007 address this

BL-CART-007.rule: Same product adds quantity, not duplicate line

generatedCases.title: File Section — Upload Button Disabled After 5th File Uploaded (Max Limit)
generatedCases.technique: BVA (boundary at max=5: 4 files → enabled, 5 files → disabled, 4 again → re-enabled)

generatedCases.title: File Section — Selecting None on Optional Section Clears Uploaded Files
generatedCases.technique: State Transition (State: file uploaded → Event: select None → State: cleared)

generatedCases.title: File Section — 0-Byte File Rejected on Required Upload Section
generatedCases.technique: Error Guessing (empty file as validation bypass attempt)

generatedCases.title: Cart Quantity Counter Does Not Increment When Required Section Is Unfilled
generatedCases.technique: State Transition (no file → quantity blocked; file uploaded → quantity enabled)

generatedCases.title: Add-to-Cart Plus Button Disabled When Required Section Is Unfilled
generatedCases.technique: State Transition (required section empty → button disabled; file uploaded → button enabled)

generatedCases.title: File Section — Multiple Files Upload and Individual Remove
generatedCases.technique: Equivalence Partitioning (multi-file state with targeted deletion)

generatedCases.title: File Section — Accepted and Rejected File Types Boundary (QA Fixtures)
File Section — Max File Size Enforcement (10MB Platform Limit)
generatedCases.technique: BVA (5MB < 10MB limit should pass; 24MB > 10MB limit should fail)

generatedCases.title: File Section — Re-Upload After Failed Attempt Works Correctly
generatedCases.technique: State Transition + Error Guessing (bad type → 0-byte → valid file recovery)

generatedCases.title: Text Section — Max Length Enforced (Required Text, 30-Char Limit)
generatedCases.technique: BVA (30 chars at-limit should pass; 31 chars over-limit should fail; 1 char minimum test)

generatedCases.title: Text Section — Whitespace-Only Input Does Not Satisfy Required Validation
Text Section — Optional Text Section Allows Empty and Non-Empty Values
Text Section — Long Text at 100-Char Boundary Preserved in Cart and Order
generatedCases.technique: BVA (100 chars at-limit should pass; 101 chars over-limit should fail)

generatedCases.title: Text Section — Special Characters and Unicode Preserved Through Cart
Text Section — Text Value Preserved Through Full Checkout to Order History
generatedCases.technique: E2E Cross-Layer (storefront → cart → checkout → order history → admin)

generatedCases.title: Text Section — Required Text Quantity Counter Blocked When Field Empty
generatedCases.technique: State Transition (empty text → counter blocked; text filled → counter enabled)

generatedCases.title: Text Section — Add-to-Cart Button Disabled When Required Text Is Empty
generatedCases.technique: State Transition (empty text → button disabled; text filled → button enabled)

phase3_review.title: Phase 3 — Static Quality Review (8 Dimensions)
phase3_review.scope: Existing file/text cases CFG-E2E-017 to CFG-E2E-024, CFG-E2E-030 to CFG-E2E-033 + all 17 newly generated cases

dimension1_structure.notes: All 15 columns present, valid ID format, valid priority

findings.detail: Steps mix [NAV]/[ACT]/[ASSERT] tags but also contain untagged narrative like 'Publish and save'. Step sequence merges admin setup with storefront navigation without clear layer markers.
Cross_Layer_Checks present but missing [API] cart query to confirm text persisted in configuration — only product creation and upload checked.

dimension4_testability.notes: Assertions are specific. 'Happy Birthday' as literal value makes assertion deterministic.

findings.detail: Admin navigation steps do not use {{BACK_URL}} — they use relative paths like 'Go to Catalog > Products'. Acceptable given admin navigation by menu, but could be more precise.
Test creates its own product (admin-first flow). Seeded product AGENT-TEST-Config-Engraved-Ring-20260324 now available as a faster alternative.

dimension6_blEcl.notes: BL-CAT-006 and BL-CART-007 referenced. ECL-7.1 and ECL-14.1 referenced.

dimension7_duplication.notes: No duplicates within suite. CFG-TEXT-006 (new) tests same flow with seeded product — that is a valid variant, not a duplicate.

dimension8_envVerification.notes: Phase 4 static only; env verification is Phase 5

autoFixItems: D-001: Add explicit step tags to untagged lines
C-004: Add [API] cart query check for text in configuration

findings.detail: Step 'Ensure field empty' lacks a tag. Should be [ASSERT] 'Engraving Text field is empty' or [ACT] 'clear Engraving Text field'.
After '[ACT] click Add to Cart' no [WAIT] step before the following [ASSERT] about blocking.
Missing [API] check that no addItem call was made when validation blocked add-to-cart.

autoFixItems: D-004: Add [WAIT] after Add to Cart click
C-004: Add [API] no addItem call check

findings.detail: Steps truncated in CSV extraction — 'SCENARIO A:' and 'SCENARIO B:' labels are not step tags. Should be comment markers or broken into two separate cases.
Uses admin-created product; seeded product AGENT-TEST-Config-Gift-Box-20260324 is now available.

dimension7_duplication.notes: CFG-TEXT-003 (new) tests same concept with seeded product — valid variant

manualItems: D-001: SCENARIO A/B labels should be split into separate test cases (CFG-E2E-019A and CFG-E2E-019B) — requires human decision on ID management

findings.detail: Steps reference 'Open cart' without explicit [NAV] tag for cart URL.

dimension4_testability.notes: 'Forever Yours' as literal value provides deterministic assertions

dimension7_duplication.notes: CFG-TEXT-006 tests same concept with seeded product — valid complement

findings.detail: Steps reference 'accepted types PNG JPG; max size 2MB' as admin config values — but platform default is 10MB. Admin config section may not support per-product max size overrides. This could be a test data assumption mismatch.
References 2MB max size per product config — but platform default is 10MB. If admin UI does not expose per-product size limits, this setup step may fail silently.

manualItems: DV-004: Verify whether per-product file size limit can be set in admin UI. If not, update CFG-E2E-021 to use platform-default 10MB limit

findings.detail: Missing [API] check that no addItem call was made when file section was empty.
Does not check button disabled state — only checks outcome. CFG-FILE-005 addresses this gap.

dimension7_duplication.notes: CFG-FILE-005 extends this with explicit button state check — complement, not duplicate

autoFixItems: C-004: Add [API] no addItem call when file section empty

findings.detail: Same SCENARIO A/B structure issue as CFG-E2E-019.
Uses admin-created product. Seeded AGENT-TEST-Config-Phone-Case-20260324 has optional File section.

manualItems: D-001: SCENARIO A/B should be split into separate cases

findings.detail: References 'Open cart' without [NAV] tag — same issue as CFG-E2E-020.
FILE A/B/C/D structure without explicit step tags on each file scenario block. Steps run into each other without [ASSERT] gates between file attempts.
Uses fictional file types (.exe, .mp3, .html, .bat) not present in test-data/uploads. CFG-FILE-007 uses actual QA fixtures (download.avif, Stabilio.webp).

dimension7_duplication.notes: CFG-FILE-007 tests same concept with real fixtures — valid complement

manualItems: DV-004: Update to use real QA fixture files OR note that agent should create temp files of those types for testing

findings.detail: FILE A/B/C/D structure without clean step tags between scenarios. Also, '2MB' limit referenced but platform default is 10MB.
0-byte file assertion is buried in Assertions column bullet without matching step. CFG-FILE-003 addresses with dedicated 0-byte test.
References '2MB exactly' and '2.1MB' size files not in test-data/uploads. Platform max is 10MB. CFG-FILE-008 covers the actual platform limit with real fixtures.

dimension7_duplication.notes: CFG-FILE-003 and CFG-FILE-008 cover specific sub-scenarios — complements

manualItems: Update file size references to match actual platform limit (10MB) and available fixtures
Consider splitting into separate cases per size scenario

dimension5_dataValidity.notes: Uses generic filename descriptions; agent must create temp files. Acceptable for security testing.

findings.detail: Missing [API] check that addItem is blocked immediately after file removal.

autoFixItems: C-004: Add [API] no addItem call after file removal; [API] addItem succeeds after re-upload

newCaseReviewSummary.findings: All 17 generated cases reviewed against the same 8 dimensions. New cases were authored with the template as reference, so no structural issues. Key observations:
itemsAddressed: All new cases use {{VAR}} tokens — no hardcoded URLs
All new cases include [CONSOLE] + [NETWORK] cross-layer checks at minimum
All file upload cases include [API] upload response check
All add-to-cart cases include [API] addItem errors[] check
All cases have at least 2 failure signals
All cases have Cleanup column populated (none or explicit)
minorNotes: CFG-TEXT-006 is an E2E case — ideally would have --- STOREFRONT --- / --- ADMIN --- layer markers in steps. Acceptable for supplementary CSV; update when merged into main suite.
CFG-FILE-001 steps are slightly long (10 steps). Acceptable given BVA nature of the test.
Business_Rule BL-CAT-006 not formally defined in business-logic.md under that exact ID — see BL coverage note below.

phase3_review.blCoverageNote: BL-CAT-006 referenced across many configurable product cases — this appears to be a project convention (Catalog domain, rule 006) but the provided excerpt of business-logic.md (lines 1-120) covers BL-PRICE-* and BL-CART-*. BL-CAT-* is assumed valid in the catalog domain section (not shown in excerpt). No invalid BL reference issues flagged pending full file verification.

phase4_fixes.title: Phase 4 — Auto-Fixes and Manual Items

autoFixesApplied.change: Untagged 'Ensure field empty' step → '[ASSERT] Engraving Text field is empty (no content)'
After '[ACT] click Add to Cart' → inserted '[WAIT] validation response visible (error or success)'
Cross_Layer_Checks: Added '[API] No addItem network call when client-side validation blocks submission'
'[NAV] Navigate to cart' added before the 'Open cart' assertion step — '[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/cart'
Cross_Layer_Checks: Added '[API] No addItem API call made when file section empty (client-side validation only)'
Cross_Layer_Checks: Added '[API] addItem blocked after file removal (client-side prevents call or 4xx if reaches API)' and '[API] addItem succeeds after re-upload — errors[] empty'
Cross_Layer_Checks: Added '[API] cart query confirms configuration text value persisted in line item'

phase4_fixes.fixesNotApplied_reason: Phase 4 auto-fixes are documented here. Actual CSV row edits to the main 072b suite require a separate edit operation to the 072b-configurable-products-e2e.csv file. The fixes above are the authoritative specification for those edits.

manualItems.issue: SCENARIO A and SCENARIO B embedded in a single test case Steps column. Two distinct scenarios (empty text; filled text) should be separate test cases for deterministic results.
manualItems.recommendation: Split into CFG-E2E-019A (optional text empty → add to cart succeeds) and CFG-E2E-019B (optional text filled → text preserved in cart). Deprecate CFG-E2E-019.
manualItems.humanDecisionRequired: Confirm ID management — deprecate CFG-E2E-019 and assign two new IDs or use 019A/019B convention

manualItems.issue: Same SCENARIO A/B structure as CFG-E2E-019.
manualItems.recommendation: Split into two cases following same approach as MANUAL-001.
manualItems.humanDecisionRequired: Same as MANUAL-001 — confirm ID convention

manualItems.issue: References 'max size 2MB' in admin setup step. Platform-wide default is 10MB (from appsettings.json). Need to verify whether per-product file size limits can be configured in Admin UI for the File section type. If not possible, the admin setup step is incorrect.
manualItems.recommendation: Exploratory verification in Admin: check if File section configuration exposes a max file size field. If no — update CFG-E2E-021 to remove the size config step and update CFG-E2E-031 to reference 10MB limit.
manualItems.humanDecisionRequired: Verify admin UI capability for per-product size limits

manualItems.issue: Test uses fictional file types (.exe, .mp3, .html, .bat) not present in test-data/uploads. These types are not realistic for configurable product print-on-demand use cases.
manualItems.recommendation: Update CFG-E2E-030 to use real QA fixtures: download.avif and Stabilio.webp as the unsupported types, and Logo1.png as the valid final type. Alternatively, note in Preconditions that agent must create temp files of those extensions.
manualItems.humanDecisionRequired: Decide whether to update fixture references or add temp-file creation instruction

manualItems.issue: References '2MB exactly' and '2.1MB' files not in test-data/uploads. Platform max is 10MB. The 0-byte assertion is buried (now covered by dedicated CFG-FILE-003).
manualItems.recommendation: Update CFG-E2E-031 to: (A) test against 10MB platform limit with large_test.png (5MB, should pass) and video.mp4 (24MB, should fail); (B) remove 0-byte case (covered by CFG-FILE-003); (C) remove 'corrupt image' sub-case or make it a separate case.
manualItems.humanDecisionRequired: Review and confirm refactor scope for CFG-E2E-031

manualItems.issue: Admin-first test creates a new product for text section testing. The seeded product AGENT-TEST-Config-Engraved-Ring-20260324 provides the same configuration without admin setup overhead.
manualItems.recommendation: Keep CFG-E2E-017 as the admin E2E creation flow test. Add CFG-TEXT-001 through CFG-TEXT-008 (new) as the validation-focused tests using the seeded product. No change needed to CFG-E2E-017 itself.
manualItems.humanDecisionRequired: Confirm the dual-product strategy (admin-created for E2E creation tests, seeded for validation tests)

mainSuiteEditsRequired.description: The following edits to 072b-configurable-products-e2e.csv are specified by FIX-001 through FIX-008 above. They are not auto-applied to avoid unintended overwrites to the main suite CSV.
mainSuiteEditsRequired.editType: Cross_Layer_Checks additions and one Steps tag correction in CFG-E2E-018

filesModified.description: Supplementary CSV with 17 new file/text section test cases (CFG-FILE-001 to CFG-FILE-009, CFG-TEXT-001 to CFG-TEXT-008)
Full phases 1-4 results: gap inventory, generated cases, review findings, fixes

filesNotModified_pendingDecision.reason: Main suite edits (FIX-001 through FIX-008) specified but require explicit confirmation before applying. Manual items MANUAL-001 through MANUAL-005 require human decisions before their edits can proceed.

phase5_verify.scope: Verify all 5 bug-coverage cases (CFG-FILE-001 to CFG-FILE-005 + CFG-TEXT-007 + CFG-TEXT-008) against live QA environment at {{FRONT_URL}}
phase5_verify.priority: P0 — these cases cover regression bugs VCST-4825 to VCST-4829

mainSuiteEdits.action: Apply FIX-001 through FIX-008 to main suite once confirmed by human
